strongest.source_title: Goldman Sachs expects ECB to deliver two 25 bps rate hikes each in April and Jun
strongest.reasoning: moderate source, strong historical pattern match.
strongest.signal_briefing: March 2022 rate hikes crushed tech (down 30% that year). Rate hikes typically pressure growth stocks and rate-sensitive sectors. Dollar strengthens on yield differential. Bond yields climb.

instrument_candidates.reason: Rates regime supports dollar / tightening proxy
Long-duration bonds pressured by rising rates
Higher discount rates pressure growth duration
Fallback broad-market proxy for a macro signal

primary_instrument.reason: Rates regime supports dollar / tightening proxy

strongest.pair_trade_rationale: Rates and fiscal repricing usually favor self-funded quality over financing-dependent growth exposures.
strongest.value_chain_notes: This is a macro/rates regime signal and should only map into sector chains when a more specific bottleneck is visible.
